name: Herbed Stuffing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Using firm textured bread, cut slices into 1/2 inch cubes.
2. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F. (150 degrees C).
3. Put the bread cubes in two 13 x 9-inch baking pans.
4. Toast the bread cubes in the oven for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from oven and cool slightly.
6. Stir in oil, onion, parsley flakes, garlic salt, sage, and seasoned pepper until combined.
7. Lightly toss the bread cubes with the seasonings to coat them evenly.
8. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container and label it Herbed Stuffing Mix.
9. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 3 to 4 months.
Makes about 12 cups of mix.
